name: 影分身之术
description: 选项1：在目标格召唤一个影分身。选项2：传送到目标格，在原地留下影分身。影分身受到一次伤害即消散，击杀分身不获得充能，分身无法行动
code: function executeSkill(context) { var caster = context.piece; var battle = context.battle; var option = selectOption({ title: '选择影分身方式', options: [{ label: '在目标格召唤分身', value: 'summon' }, { label: '传送至目标格，原地留下分身', value: 'teleport' }] }); if (option === null || option === undefined || option.needsOptionSelection) return option; var pos = selectTarget({ type: 'grid', range: 99, filter: 'all' }); if (!pos || pos.needsTargetSelection) return pos; var targetTile = battle.map && battle.map.tiles && battle.map.tiles.find(function(t) { return t.x === pos.x && t.y === pos.y; }); if (!targetTile) return { success: false, message: '目标格不存在' }; var cloneX, cloneY; if (option === 'summon') { var pieceAtPos = battle.pieces.find(function(p) { return p.x === pos.x && p.y === pos.y && p.currentHp > 0; }); if (pieceAtPos) return { success: false, message: '目标格已被占用' }; cloneX = pos.x; cloneY = pos.y; } else { var pieceAtPos2 = battle.pieces.find(function(p) { return p.x === pos.x && p.y === pos.y && p.currentHp > 0 && p.instanceId !== caster.instanceId; }); if (pieceAtPos2) return { success: false, message: '目标格已被占用' }; cloneX = caster.x; cloneY = caster.y; caster.x = pos.x; caster.y = pos.y; } var cloneId = 'naruto-clone-' + Date.now(); var clone = { instanceId: cloneId, templateId: caster.templateId, name: caster.name, ownerPlayerId: caster.ownerPlayerId, faction: caster.faction, x: cloneX, y: cloneY, maxHp: 1, currentHp: 1, displayMaxHp: caster.maxHp, displayCurrentHp: caster.currentHp, displayAttack: caster.attack, displayDefense: caster.defense || 0, displayMoveRange: caster.moveRange, attack: 0, defense: 0, moveRange: 0, skills: [], buffs: [], debuffs: [], ruleTags: [], rules: [], statusTags: [{ id: 'naruto-clone-tag-' + cloneId, name: '影分身', type: 'naruto-clone', visible: false, remainingDuration: -1, remainingUses: -1, intensity: 1, stacks: 1, relatedRules: ['rule-naruto-clone-died', 'rule-naruto-clone-immobile'] }] }; battle.pieces.push(clone); addRuleById(cloneId, 'rule-naruto-clone-died'); addRuleById(cloneId, 'rule-naruto-clone-immobile'); return { success: true, message: caster.name + '使用了影分身之术' }; }
previewCode: function calculatePreview(piece, skillDef) { return { description: '选择召唤分身或传送并留下分身；分身1血，受伤即消，击杀不给充能', expectedValues: {} }; }
